parameters: A lot of them look the same, i think.
No, that one looks familiar in a mean way.
\FX<FC, soft shake>I said do not say it.\RX
Maybe the stone have been following us.
How much water do we have left?
Zuko, you are still stronger than me.
Exactly. So I can survive being thirsty longer.
We should at least share it.
Fine. Tiny sip each. Like fancy people.
That was the saddest fancy drink ever.
I thought I heard Gin complaining.
Which is weird, because for once I wanted to hear
Do not tell him that when we find him again.
That was not an okay kind of almost falling.
You are not allowed to fall over unless I say so.
It is a great rule. I invented it.
Then I catch you and pretend it was part of the
Hey. Keep looking at me, okay?
Because I am loud and easy to find.
Good. Keep answering. If you answer, you are still
Good. We are both here. That means we keep going.
But I am walking scared, which is better than
